## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX.ai's proposal for Zuplo's AI-driven content strategy and address any questions or concerns.](https://fathom.video/share/KF-_zTeen3hsWLEyR14x-hbYJZavneHC?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Zuplo's focus is on transactional and commercial queries, particularly in AI/GEO spaces](https://fathom.video/share/KF-_zTeen3hsWLEyR14x-hbYJZavneHC?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Timing concerns: Zuplo's CEO may prefer to delay engagement due to internal product launches and priorities](https://fathom.video/share/KF-_zTeen3hsWLEyR14x-hbYJZavneHC?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
  - [GrowthX.ai proposes a flexible, experimentation-driven approach to content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/KF-_zTeen3hsWLEyR14x-hbYJZavneHC?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)
  - [Previous collaboration showed some growth, but CEO expects higher traffic results](https://fathom.video/share/KF-_zTeen3hsWLEyR14x-hbYJZavneHC?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)

## Topics

### Zuplo's Content Strategy Goals

  - [Prioritize transactional and commercial queries in AI/GEO spaces](https://fathom.video/share/KF-_zTeen3hsWLEyR14x-hbYJZavneHC?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Aim to appear in competitor searches and relevant AI discussions](https://fathom.video/share/KF-_zTeen3hsWLEyR14x-hbYJZavneHC?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
  - [Focus on replicating successful customer journey: Google search → directories → ChatGPT → Zuplo](https://fathom.video/share/KF-_zTeen3hsWLEyR14x-hbYJZavneHC?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
  - [Treat directory listings (e.g., G2) as top-of-funnel awareness builders](https://fathom.video/share/KF-_zTeen3hsWLEyR14x-hbYJZavneHC?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)

### GrowthX.ai's Proposed Approach

  - [Flexible content production (min. 20 pieces/week) with scalability for programmatic opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/KF-_zTeen3hsWLEyR14x-hbYJZavneHC?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
  - [Use of Scrunch for tracking GEO mentions and visibility](https://fathom.video/share/KF-_zTeen3hsWLEyR14x-hbYJZavneHC?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [Develop hypotheses based on customer interviews, signup flows, and pattern matching](https://fathom.video/share/KF-_zTeen3hsWLEyR14x-hbYJZavneHC?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Synthesize various data points (e.g., Reddit, SEMrush) to inform prompt strategies](https://fathom.video/share/KF-_zTeen3hsWLEyR14x-hbYJZavneHC?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
  - [Balance between SEO and AI-focused content, avoiding "bot-only" content](https://fathom.video/share/KF-_zTeen3hsWLEyR14x-hbYJZavneHC?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### Measurement and Success Criteria

  - [Track GEO mentions, clicks, conversions, and visibility](https://fathom.video/share/KF-_zTeen3hsWLEyR14x-hbYJZavneHC?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
  - [Monitor baseline traffic metrics from various channels (direct, branded, organic)](https://fathom.video/share/KF-_zTeen3hsWLEyR14x-hbYJZavneHC?tab=summary&timestamp=716.0)
  - [Qualitative and quantitative assessment of funnel performance](https://fathom.video/share/KF-_zTeen3hsWLEyR14x-hbYJZavneHC?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
  - [Recognize challenges in attributing success due to the evolving landscape](https://fathom.video/share/KF-_zTeen3hsWLEyR14x-hbYJZavneHC?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)

### Potential Hurdles and CEO Concerns

  - [Timing: Zuplo's current focus on product launches and MCP-related initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/KF-_zTeen3hsWLEyR14x-hbYJZavneHC?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
  - [Resource allocation: Concern about distracting the growth team from core objectives](https://fathom.video/share/KF-_zTeen3hsWLEyR14x-hbYJZavneHC?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [ROI on time investment: Previous collaboration showed growth, but below CEO's expectations](https://fathom.video/share/KF-_zTeen3hsWLEyR14x-hbYJZavneHC?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)
  - [Preference for in-house content development aligned with current product focus](https://fathom.video/share/KF-_zTeen3hsWLEyR14x-hbYJZavneHC?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)

### Next Steps and Considerations

  - [Adrian to present proposal to Zuplo's CEO, addressing timing and resource concerns](https://fathom.video/share/KF-_zTeen3hsWLEyR14x-hbYJZavneHC?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
  - [Explore potential for GrowthX.ai to enhance Zuplo's capabilities without hindering progress](https://fathom.video/share/KF-_zTeen3hsWLEyR14x-hbYJZavneHC?tab=summary&timestamp=920.0)
  - [Consider revisiting the partnership in \~6 months when the MCP ecosystem is more mature](https://fathom.video/share/KF-_zTeen3hsWLEyR14x-hbYJZavneHC?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [GrowthX.ai open to connecting with Zuplo's CEO for further discussion if needed](https://fathom.video/share/KF-_zTeen3hsWLEyR14x-hbYJZavneHC?tab=summary&timestamp=1060.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Adrian to review proposal with Zuplo's CEO and provide feedback by end of the week](https://fathom.video/share/KF-_zTeen3hsWLEyR14x-hbYJZavneHC?tab=summary&timestamp=1113.0)
  - [Continue ongoing projects with Dave, aiming to wrap up by end of June](https://fathom.video/share/KF-_zTeen3hsWLEyR14x-hbYJZavneHC?tab=summary&timestamp=1156.0)
  - [Kyle to remain available for any additional questions or clarifications](https://fathom.video/share/KF-_zTeen3hsWLEyR14x-hbYJZavneHC?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
  - [Potentially schedule follow-up discussion based on CEO's feedback](https://fathom.video/share/KF-_zTeen3hsWLEyR14x-hbYJZavneHC?tab=summary&timestamp=1195.0)
